title: Front Office Manager - Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
